title: On Barren Hill Work In Progress
description: A dreamlike, visually striking & ultimately hopeful Dance-Theatre show interrogating the relationship to the natural world-the tension between grief & growth-after infertility & loss. Bathe in a heady combination of movement, lyrical text, opera & projection. Devised in & celebrating diverse environments across Europe, join a cyclical journey across a lush Czech climax forest, barren Mediterranean cliff edge & harsh shingle dessert before plunging into an acrid silver lake. The work will feature co-created elements from creative workshops with women with lived experience of the themes. There will be a post-show discussion at each performance & a small display of photography & artwork relating to the show's development. Fertility Network UK will also be present. *Pine needle syrup cocktail/mocktail with each ticket* Intimate & unique 40 capacity venue- book ahead to avoid disappointment! Work in progress show with intention to tour. R&D supported by South East Dance

venue.name: Fishing Museum Loft - The Old Net Loft
